response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00-01:48: Analyzed visual content: The character is talking about merchandise for her birthday. No vocal music.
2. 01:48-03:07: Analyzed visual/audio content: An original song begins with lyrics displayed directly on the screen.
3. Transcribed the Japanese lyrics from the screen and created an English translation for the song title "To the Su-Squirrels" (すうりすへ).
4. Compiled the information into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a character introducing her birthday merchandise set, followed by a vocal performance of an original song dedicated to her fans, known as the "Su-Squirrels".

scenes.description: The character presents her birthday merchandise set and talks about the details. No vocal music is playing.
The character sings an original song dedicated to her fans, with the lyrics displayed on the screen over an illustration.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
すうりすへ
ずっとまっててくれてありがとう
このすうがどんなにささえられてるか
わかるかなあ
じまんのすうになるよ
これからもしんらいしてね
たのしんでね
すうががんばれるのは
すうりすのおかげ！！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
To the Su-Squirrels,
Thank you for waiting for me for so long.
I wonder if you know how much I, Su, am supported?
I wonder if you understand.
I will become a Su that you can be proud of.
Please trust me from now on too.
Please enjoy it.
The reason Su can do her best
Is thanks to you, Su-Squirrels!!
